resultList.dtldesc: Experience luxury living in this stunning 4 BHK penthouse for sale in Yeshwanthpur Industrial Suburb, Bangalore, a west-facing, vaastu-compliant home that offers a perfect blend of elegance, comfort, and modern amenities in a prime location.Property Specifications Spread across a super area of 3200 sqft, this stunning penthouse occupies the 8th and 9th floors of a 9-floor building, ensuring breathtaking views and ample natural light throughout the day.The home is fully furnished, offering complete comfort and style. It features 4 spacious bedrooms, each designed with modern fittings, and 4 well-appointed bathrooms - 3 attached to the bedrooms and 1 common, all equipped with western commodes and geyser facilities for added convenience. 2 balconies are attached to the master bedroom and the kitchen, providing excellent views of the surrounding apartments and the landscape of the nearby railway station.Designed with both functionality and aesthetics in mind, this penthouse includes a separate living and dining area that provides a spacious setting for family gatherings. In addition, there is a pooja room for spiritual moments, a guest house for visitors, and a glass room on the terrace that allows for stunning views and relaxation. The rooftop features a bar, a cooking area, and a bathroom, offering the perfect space for entertaining or enjoying time outdoors.The modular kitchen is equipped with a chimney, piped gas connection, and a utility area attached to the kitchen, adding convenience for everyday tasks. The flooring throughout the penthouse is a mix of vitrified tiles in the common areas and wooden flooring in the bedrooms, creating a warm and sophisticated ambiance.Facilities This penthouse offers both covered and open parking for convenience. Residents benefit from 24-hour water supply and 100 power backup, ensuring uninterrupted comfort. The building is secured with a dedicated security guard and CCTV surveillance for enhanced safety. Additionally, two lifts are available for each block, providing smooth and hassle-free access.LocalityThis penthouse is located in a prime area near Vaishnavi Safire, providing easy access to essential services and conveniences. Schools, hospitals, malls, and supermarkets are nearby, making it a perfect place for families. Public transport is easily accessible, with buses and autos available in the area. For those commuting by train or metro, both the Yeshwanthpur Railway Station and Yeshwanthpur Metro Station are right opposite the apartment, offering exceptional connectivity.This penthouse offers a rare opportunity to own a luxurious, spacious, and well-connected home in one of Bangalores most sought-after neighborhoods. It combines modern amenities, comfort, and convenience to create an ideal living space for those who appreciate luxury living.

resultList.dtldesc: Discover a perfect blend of comfort and modern living in this 3 BHK flat at Puravankara Purva Riviera, Marathahalli, Bangalore. With its thoughtfully designed interiors, high-end finishes, and an ideal layout, this home offers a serene retreat while keeping you well-connected to the citys essentials. Property Specifications. This 3 BHK furnished flat, located on the 3rd floor of a 9-story building, spans 1583 sq-ft of super area and offers a comfortable and well-appointed living space. The flat is equipped with air conditioning in all three bedrooms, providing optimal comfort throughout the year. It features modern furnishings, including wardrobes, a sofa bed, a TV, and a dining table, ensuring a ready-to-move-in experience. The three bedrooms come with en-suite bathrooms, two of which are attached, while the third is a common bathroom. All bathrooms are western-style and equipped with geysers. The flat also boasts three balconies one attached to the bedroom, one in the living area, and one in the kitchen each providing views of the swimming pool, adding a serene touch to your everyday living. The living cum dining area is spacious and well-lit, offering an ideal setting for relaxation and gatherings. The modular kitchen is well-equipped with a chimney and piped gas connection, complemented by a utility area attached for added convenience. The flooring throughout the flat is done with vitrified tiles, ensuring durability and easy maintenance. Facilities The property offers covered parking, 24-hour water supply from both borewell and corporation sources, and power backup. For added security, a guard is present, and CCTV cameras are installed throughout the premises. Additionally, two lifts are available for easy access to all floors. Locality The property is conveniently located behind Spice Garden Bus Stop, next to Purava Fountain Rohan Vasantha. Schools, hospitals, malls, and supermarkets are within 1 km, ensuring easy access to essential services. Public transport options, including buses and autos, are readily available, while banks and ATMs are just 500 meters away. Additionally, the Marathahalli metro station is nearby, providing seamless connectivity.
